title: Perform a safe retriable mutation
goal: Update Acme's industry to Robotics using a write pattern that is safe to retry.
assumptions: Agents will use idempotency when the harness hints that retries may occur.
skeem's idempotency support materially reduces duplicate side effects.
prompt: Update Acme's industry to Robotics. The call may be replayed, so use a retry-safe approach.
success_checks: The write includes an idempotency key
Replaying the same write does not create extra side effects
failure_modes: Multiple conflicting writes created on replay
